generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system for lighting automation within TwinLight framework, integrating reinforcement learning-based optimization in BOREALIS"
]

instance HVACControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC unit control system with domain-specific logic for energy optimization and operational efficiency"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningController : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "AI-driven controller implementing reinforcement learning policies for adaptive building control"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor capturing occupancy patterns in the building environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring temperature levels for energy consumption and comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor tracking lighting levels and visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor measuring energy usage patterns in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance BOREALISHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing non-visual health effects (e.g., air quality, ventilation) as defined in BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:producedData NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BOREALISHealthSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static geometric and semantic BIM model extended with runtime metadata (sensor locations, control logic) via model-driven transformations"
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model containing extracted metadata (device IDs, endpoint addresses) from BIM for runtime interface generation"
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control models (lighting automation, reinforcement learning policies) embedded in BIM environment"
]

instance RealTimeOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy patterns captured from post-occupancy sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements for energy and comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RealTimeLightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting level measurements and visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EnergyPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time energy consumption data for optimization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance NonVisualHealthMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect data (air quality, ventilation) captured by BOREALIS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating model-to-model/model-to-text transformations for BIM-to-DT conversion using tools like Revit and Eclipse PDe"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnrichedBIMModel, RuntimeMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional communication middleware enabling lightweight messaging between physical devices and DT via MQTT/CoAP protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOccupancyData, RealTimeTemperatureData, RealTimeLightingData, EnergyPerformanceData, NonVisualHealthMetrics
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized data exchange framework facilitating synchronization between DT and IoT devices with JSON-based messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOccupancyData, RealTimeTemperatureData, RealTimeLightingData, EnergyPerformanceData, NonVisualHealthMetrics
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform for interactive monitoring and simulation of building digital representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling tools (e.g., Revit) used by Building Control Engineers to model devices and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnrichedBIMModel, ControlLogicModel
]

// C6: Services
instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization interface using Unreal Engine 5 for interactive monitoring of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "AI-driven optimization service implementing reinforcement learning for adaptive building control (BOREALIS framework)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time performance analysis service for decision-making support across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight, RefurbishmentRecommendation
]

instance CustomServiceExtension : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular extension point for domain-specific plugins (IoT analytics, AI control strategies)"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomPluginAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization feedback showing building occupancy, lighting levels, and HVAC status in immersive environment"
]

instance AdaptiveControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning recommendations for dynamic control adjustments (lighting, HVAC) based on real-time conditions"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control signals for energy-efficient operation (lighting dimming, HVAC optimization) derived from predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analysis comparing current operational metrics against historical baselines for trend identification"
]

instance RefurbishmentRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for building refurbishment based on energy efficiency and operational performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomPluginAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific actions enabled through custom service extensions (e.g., IoT analytics integration)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EnrichedBIMModel, LightingControlSystem, HVACControlSystem, OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LightingLevelSensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor, BOREALISHealthSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via standardized extension points in the framework’s modular architecture. These outputs are transmitted back to the physical system through the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to adjust building control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC adjustments). The framework supports runtime configuration management, allowing dynamic adjustments without redeployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with **real-time synchronization** (sub-second latency) for critical operational data (e.g., sensor inputs, control outputs). The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, ensuring the DT’s state reflects the physical asset’s instantaneous conditions. The time-scale is optimized for **continuous monitoring and adaptive control** during the operational phase of the building’s life cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with a central DT framework acting as a hub. Key components include:
  1. **BIM-centric control configuration**: Couples BIM with middleware (Hono/Ditto) for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication.
  2. **Modular extension points**: Enable integration of custom services (e.g., AI analytics, IoT plugins) without altering the core framework.
  3. **Runtime synchronization layer**: Ensures seamless data flow between physical assets, BIM models, and DT services.
  The architecture supports **scalability** from individual devices to entire infrastructure systems, with standardized APIs for interoperability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire building life cycle:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models incorporate device configurations and control logic (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control framework).
  2. **Construction phase**: Automated validation ensures compliance with BIM standards and integration with physical devices.
  3. **Operational phase**: Real-time data synchronization (via Hono/Ditto) enables continuous monitoring, optimization (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning), and adaptive control.
  The DT covers the **as-operated** representation phase, focusing on dynamic operational aspects beyond static BIM models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Model validation**: Automated checks during BIM model processing to detect inconsistencies or missing metadata (e.g., sensor configurations).
  2. **Real-time synchronization**: Continuous data exchange via Hono/Ditto minimizes semantic drift between the DT and physical assets.
  3. **ODTE metric**: Quantifies the DT’s interoperability and architectural soundness, validating its alignment with the physical system.
  4. **Uncertainty management**: While not explicitly quantified in the documents, the framework assumes that BIM’s static nature is bridged by runtime data integration, reducing discrepancies between design and operation phases."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on:
  1. **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto use lightweight messaging (e.g., MQTT) for real-time data exchange between physical devices and the DT.
  2. **Middleware integration**: BIM models are linked to physical devices via standardized endpoints (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic mappings) extracted during the model-driven transformation.
  3. **Bidirectional communication**: Data flows from physical sensors to the DT (for monitoring) and from the DT to actuators (for control), ensuring closed-loop operation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with the following hosting aspects:
  1. **Centralized hosting**: The DT framework acts as a unified hub, integrating BIM models, middleware (Hono/Ditto), and visualization (Unreal Engine) in a single deployment environment.
  2. **Modular extension points**: Allow for decentralized hosting of custom services (e.g., AI analytics) while maintaining interoperability with the core DT infrastructure.
  3. **Runtime adaptability**: Supports dynamic updates (e.g., reinforcement learning policies) without requiring full redeployment, leveraging the modular architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  1. **External IoT platforms**: Via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for bidirectional communication with non-BIM-based sensors or actuators.
  2. **BIM collaboration tools**: Enables seamless data exchange with other AECO stakeholders (e.g., architects, engineers) via standardized BIM formats (e.g., IFC).
  3. **Third-party analytics services**: Custom services can be integrated via the framework’s extension points to leverage external data sources (e.g., weather APIs, maintenance logs)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to the following standards:
  1. **BIM standards**: Leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the semantic backbone, ensuring interoperability with AECO-specific tools (e.g., Revit, IFC).
  2. **Middleware standards**: Uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto for standardized real-time data exchange, supporting MQTT and other IoT protocols.
  3. **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Follows model-to-model and model-to-text transformations to automate DT deployment, reducing manual effort and ensuring consistency.
  4. **AECO-specific frameworks**: Integrates with TwinLight and BOREALIS projects, which define domain-specific control semantics (e.g., lighting automation, reinforcement learning)."
]
